articles.title: Music is the truest form of love I’ve ever experienced: Shruti Haasan
articles.description: “I don’t need a day to celebrate music. On one level, it’s my work. But, on another, it’s my best friend. I always go back to it on a good or a bad day," says Shruti Haasan.

articles.title: Katy Perry playfully calls out exes during concert
articles.description: Katy Perry playfully referenced past relationships during a recent concert, using a stage prop to 'decline' calls from exes like Diplo, John Mayer, and Orlando Bloom. The singer then enthusiastically accepted a call from 'JPJT,' her nod to current partner Justin Trudeau, highlighting their strong bond. This comes after their recent red carpet debut and a romantic picnic, with Perry expressing how Trudeau grounds her.

articles.title: Gladiator II Fell Short Because It Lacked Original Film’s Emotional Backbone, Says Russell Crowe
articles.description: A legacy blockbuster sparks debate as its creator questions what went wrong with the sequel.

articles.title: BTS Jin Kiss Case: 50-Year-Old Japanese Woman Files Objection Ahead Of Trial - Deets
articles.description: The legal case involving BTS member Jin's fan event kissing incident has taken a fresh turn. A 50-year-old Japanese woman indicted for forcibly kissing the singer has formally objected to the court's trial schedule, raising questions about upcoming proceedings.

articles.title: Cook earning Rs 15,500 left after 4 years despite gifts and salary hikes. Man says her exit taught him a harsh lesson
articles.description: A man's four-year relationship with his cook ended abruptly when she left for a higher-paying job, despite his consistent salary increases, gifts, and bonuses. He learned that perceived loyalty doesn't always equate to shared value, as her decision was driven by a better opportunity. This experience highlighted how individual priorities shape relationships, even those seemingly built on trust and kindness.

articles.title: ‘Jholi khaali hai humaari’: Dipika Kakar pens emotional note for husband Shoaib Ibrahim
articles.description: Dipika Kakar penned a heartfelt birthday note for her husband Shoaib Ibrahim, describing him as her strength and her source of peace.

articles.title: Balan The Boy OTT release: Where to watch Chidambaram's Malayalam thriller movie online after its theatrical run
articles.description: After the huge success of Manjummel Boys, director Chidambaram is back with Balan: The Boy. The Malayalam thriller has started its box-office run on a strong note, with collections rising significantly on its second day. Positive audience response and word-of-mouth appear to be driving the film's momentum. Read on to know where it will stream online after its theatrical run.

articles.title: Vivek Dahiya reveals his ‘identity’ has changed after becoming a father; says, ‘Dil ki dhadkan badal gayi hai’
articles.description: Actor Vivek Dahiya has opened up about the profound emotional transformation fatherhood has brought into his life. He shared in a recent vlog how his identity as a man has shifted, with his "heartbeat changing" since becoming a parent. Vivek also discussed forming new connections with fellow parents, bonding over conversations about children and schooling, while admitting to constantly missing his babies when apart.

articles.title: Cocktail 2 box office day 2: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna starrer nears Rs 51 crore worldwide
articles.description: Cocktail 2, starring Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna, has collected Rs 50.95 crore worldwide within two days of release. The romantic drama witnessed strong growth on Saturday, taking its India net collection to Rs 29.75 crore.

articles.title: Indresh Malik Signed Up For The Pyramid Scheme Because Of Heeramandi - Details Inside | EXCL
articles.description: Indresh Malik played the role of Ustaad ji in Sanjay Leela Bhansali's Heeramandi. In an exclusive interview, the actor opened up about doing The Pyramid Scheme, which is streaming on Amazon Prime Video.

articles.title: 'Nooru Saami' BO day 2: Swasika starrer sees 62.7% growth
articles.description: 'Nooru Saami' witnessed a significant surge in box office collections on its second day, raking in Rs 1.22 crore net, a 62.7% jump from its opening day. The film, directed by Sasi and starring Vijay Antony, has now amassed Rs 1.97 crore net in India. The story centers on a mother's unwavering wish and her sons' diverging paths, with ETimes praising its departure from conventional village drama tropes.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Rajinikanth: ‘Spirituality gives me a lot of power; more than name, fame and money, I seek...'
articles.description: More than fame, fortune, or recognition, veteran actor Rajinikanth believes spirituality is his greatest source of strength. Here's what his quote means.

articles.title: Cocktail 2 box office collection day 2: Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna, Kriti Sanon's rom-com enters Rs 50 crore mark worldwide
articles.description: Cocktail 2, starring Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna, has got off to a strong start at the box office. The film has become Shahid Kapoor's second-biggest opener after Kabir Singh. Despite getting mixed reviews, the romantic comedy saw a good rise in collections on its second day. Read on to know how much it earned in India.

articles.title: Tarot Reading For 21st June 2026: Financial Opportunities, Love Prospects And Career Insights
articles.description: Discover what the stars have planned for your career, finances, relationships, health and travel as each zodiac sign navigates opportunities and challenges today.

articles.title: Father’s Day 2026: Arjun Bijlani Reveals How He Keeps Son Ayaan Away From Objectionable Content – EXCLUSIVE
articles.description: On the occasion of Father's Day 2026, Arjun Bijlani had an exclusive interaction with Zoom/Telly Talk India, where he opened up about parenting a Gen Alpha kid and explained how he keeps his son Ayaan away from objectionable content on social media.

articles.title: World Music Day 2026: Shilpa Rao Says Songs Can Make You 'Human Again', Feels Music Equals Love - EXCL
articles.description: On World Music Day 2026, singer Shilpa Rao reflected on music's ability to heal, unite and inspire. In an exclusive conversation, she opened up about her bond with fans, the joy of recording, and why she believes music equals love.

articles.title: Father's Day 2026: Abhinav Shukla Reflects On Being Girl Dad; 'Daughters Are Emotionally Intelligent' | EXCL
articles.description: In an exclusive interview with Zoom, Abhinav Shukla opens up about being a father to two beautiful girls. The actor and his wife Rubina Dilaik were blessed with twin girls on November 27, 2023.

articles.title: 'Balan: The Boy' box office collections day 2: Chidambaram's thriller grows 29.1 percent; Crosses Rs 4 crore India Net
articles.description: Chidambaram's latest thriller, 'Balan: The Boy,' is making waves at the box office, with its Saturday collections surging by 29.1 percent to Rs 2.35 crore, pushing the two-day net total past Rs 4 crore. The film saw a significant jump in audience turnout, especially during evening and night shows. Kerala continues to be the strongest market, contributing substantially to the film's impressive run.

articles.title: Street food as theatre stages its own reality
articles.description: In a world that is increasingly becoming sanitised — delivered at your door through apps — the street food stall remains a bastion of reality.

articles.title: Weekly Love Horoscope, June 22-28, 2026: Healing conversations, emotional clarity and meaningful connections
articles.description: Weekly Love Horoscope Honest emotions, deeper connections, healing moments, and fresh romantic possibilities guide your week.

articles.title: Father's Day: 7 Hollywood Actors Whose Children Followed Them Into Showbiz
articles.description: For Father's Day, we revisit these Hollywood celebrities and famous dads have children who have also become actors. Many of them also shared screen space together, while some have played younger versions of their parents.

articles.title: Bookrack for the week
articles.description: Book reviews India: Weekly book roundup features football history, Elon Musk insights, Chand Bibi biography and lifestyle science picks spanning sport, leadership, history and wellness for readers across India this week covering major new releases .

articles.title: 35th Seoul Music Awards: ATEEZ Bags Daesang, BTS Gets Special Hallyu Award - FULL Winners List
articles.description: The 35th Seoul Music Awards 2026 celebrated the biggest names in K-Pop, with ATEEZ winning the prestigious Daesang. The ceremony featured performances and awards across multiple categories, honouring both established artists and rising groups.

articles.title: Father's Day Special: 7 Best On-Screen Dads Of Indian Television
articles.description: Father’s Day is being celebrated on Sunday (June 21). On this special occasion, have a look at the 7 best on-screen dads of Indian television.

articles.title: Dilip Kumar had a second marriage with Asma, 16 years after wedding with Saira Banu: 'Can never forgive myself for the hurt I caused her'
articles.description: Dilip Kumar's brief second marriage to Asma in 1981, a period of turmoil for Saira Banu, is revisited. Asma later sought privacy in Vancouver, lamenting media intrusion and claiming most reports were false. Dilip Kumar, in his autobiography, admitted the marriage was a mistake orchestrated by his sisters, regretting the pain caused to Saira and their subsequent reconciliation.

articles.title: Not a showstopper act
articles.description: Book review: Vishwas Patil’s Marathi novel on the Indian circus is overburdened by research and detail, weakening narrative flow and character depth. The translation struggles and thin characterisation reduce the impact of an otherwise ambitious historical narrative now

articles.title: Quote of the day by Johnny Depp: 'Growing old is unavoidable, but never growing up is possible. I believe you can retain certain things from your childhood if you protect them...' Hollywood icon teaches an important lesson about staying young at heart
articles.description: Johnny Depp's quote of the day reflects on the difference between growing older and losing the spirit of childhood. The actor suggests that while aging is inevitable, people can preserve qualities such as imagination, curiosity, and wonder if they consciously protect them. The quote is often associated with Depp's views on creativity and his role in Finding Neverland. It also offers insight into the life and career of the Hollywood star, whose unconventional roles and enduring popularity have made him one of cinema's most recognizable figures.

articles.title: Gurmeet Choudhary and Debina Bonnerjee enjoy family time during Jamai Shosthi; see pics
articles.description: Debina Bonnerjee and Gurmeet Choudhary recently observed Jamai Shosthi with their daughters, Lianna and Divisha, showcasing their special family moments. Clad in beautiful traditional outfits, they posted delightful photos of a lovingly prepared feast. Gurmeet reflected on his long-held dream of marrying a Bengali woman, a wish granted with Debina. Their transformation from co-stars to proud parents of two girls was beautifully illustrated during the celebration.

articles.title: Tax cut on liquor dubious and harmful: Pinarayi Vijayan
articles.description: Pinarayi Vijayan criticizes Kerala’s proposed tax cut on low-alcohol liquor, warning it may boost consumption, favor liquor firms, and harm society.

articles.title: Poet and writer P Narayana Kurup passes away
articles.description: Renowned Malayalam poet-writer P Narayana Kurup dies at 92; two-time Kerala Sahitya Akademi awardee and Padma Shri recipient (2022), say reports.

articles.title: Dialogue of the day from The Secret Life of Walter Mitty, 'To see the world...'
articles.description: A powerful reminder that the true purpose of life lies in exploring the unknown, connecting with others, and fully experiencing the world beyond our comfort zones.

articles.title: BTS’ Jungkook’s former classmate reveals why he was bullied in school
articles.description: The anecdote, which recently circulated online, paints a picture of a shy young Jungkook long before he debuted as BTS’ “Golden Maknae.”

articles.title: Ram Charan, Upasana reveal daughter Klin Kaara's face for the first time
articles.description: Ram Charan and Upasana Kamineni Konidela delighted fans by revealing their elder daughter Klin Kaara's face for the first time on her birthday. The couple shared adorable family photos, including a glimpse of their newborn twins, Shivram and Anveera Devi. Upasana spoke about her evolving motherhood experience, finding fulfillment in raising all three children with Ram Charan's active involvement.

articles.title: 10 Bollywood Celebrities Who Took A Break From Social Media And Why
articles.description: From Samantha Ruth Prabhu to Anushka Sharma, several Bollywood celebrities have taken breaks from social media over the years.

articles.title: Suman Ghosh accuses Prosenjit Chatterjee of stealing character design from his script in Abhiman: ‘He tried to justify’
articles.description: Bengali actor Prosenjit Chatterjee responded to the accusations as well, denying that the idea and character of the film Abhiman was lifted from his script

articles.title: Exclusive - Vijayendra Kumeria talks about the prep he did for his role in Juhi Mui: says 'Observed cops and worked on my physique'
articles.description: Vijayendra Kumeria is ready to captivate viewers with his new television role as a dedicated police officer in 'Juhi Mui'. To prepare for this demanding character, he has transformed his physique through rigorous training and debuted a moustache. He portrays a tough yet empathetic cop, a combination that excites him greatly and promises an engaging performance.

articles.title: Alia Bhatt gets roasted by Samay Raina over Cannes 2026 appearance on India's Got Latent S2: ‘Yahan cameras aap pe hai’
articles.description: One moment on India's Got Latent season 2 stood out was Samay Raina's playful dig at Alia Bhatt, seemingly referencing the actor's Cannes 2026 controversy.

articles.title: Dastaar | song - Pind
‘There was pin-drop silence’: Upasana Singh recalls saying ‘kaun hai ye aadmi’ to Salman
articles.description: Upasana Singh recalled how an impromptu remark to Salman Khan became her iconic 'Kaun Hai Ye Aadmi?' catchphrase on TV.

articles.title: Hollywood Mourns James Burrows, The Director Who Helped Create Friends Magic
articles.description: Television legend James Burrows, the iconic director behind Friends, Cheers, Frasier, Will & Grace, Taxi and many more beloved sitcoms, has passed away at the age of 85. With a career spanning over five decades, more than 1,000 TV episodes, and 11 Emmy Awards, Burrows helped shape modern television comedy. Tributes are pouring in from across Hollywood as fans remember the man whose work brought laughter to millions around the world.

articles.title: When Technology Becomes a Storyteller: AI Films at MIFF Open New Horizons of Storytelling
articles.description: Mumbai[Maharashtra]: The 19th Mumbai International Film Festival (MIFF) 2026 celebrated the spirit of cinematic innovation with titles under the section, “The AI Films.” Exploring a bold convergence of storytelling, technology, and imagination, the curated films demonstrated how artificial intelligence acts as a powerful new creative tool, enabling filmmakers from across the globe to explore complex [...]

articles.title: All about the ‘House of the Dragon’ Season 3 cast changes
articles.description: Anticipation is high for 'House of the Dragon' Season 3, promising more intense battles. Several key characters are returning, including Rhaenyra Targaryen and Alicent Hightower. However, some beloved figures like Rhaenys Targaryen and the Cargyll twins will not be back due to their fates in previous seasons. The new season also introduces fresh faces and a recast role for Princess Jaehaera Targaryen, set to premiere on June 21, 2026.

articles.title: Katy Perry announces new single 'Watch It Burn', set for June 25 release
articles.description: Katy Perry has announced her new single, 'Watch It Burn', releasing on June 25. The singer unveiled the cover art and shared that the song explores themes of suppressed anger and confronting pain from a tough year, following her 2024 album '143'.

articles.title: Gladiator II failed because it lacked a moral core: Russell Crowe
articles.description: Russell Crowe believes Gladiator II failed to match the original's success because it lacked the "moral core" rooted in Maximus's journey to avenge his family. He said the filmmakers of the sequel didn't understand why the first film was a hit.

articles.title: Shah Rukh Khan's dance at Revati Sule's wedding bash goes viral
articles.description: Shah Rukh Khan's dance at the pre-wedding bash of Supriya Sule's daughter, Revati, has gone viral. SRK was seen grooving with the couple to 'Koi Mil Gaya', with singer Rahul Vaidya sharing the video from the star-studded Mumbai event.

articles.title: Waseem Mushtaq: Music continues to heal and connect with people even decades later
articles.description: Actor Waseem Mushtaq, known for his television roles, cherishes World Music Day for his debut stage performance in a funny Punjabi song. He emphasizes relentless practice for vocal improvement and highlights the pressure of live singing. Mushtaq aims to create soulful, honest, and timeless music, revealing a lifelong passion that predates his acting career. He has five original tracks ready for release, marking a significant return to his musical roots.

articles.title: Iranian Singer Parastoo Ahmadi Sentenced To 74 Lashes For Performing Concert Without Hijab
articles.description: Iranian singer Parastoo Ahmadi reportedly gets 74 lashes and a two year travel and artistic ban over a hijab free YouTube concert.

articles.title: 7 Must-Watch Films Featuring AR Rahman’s Iconic Music After Main Vaapas Aaunga
articles.description: As A.R. Rahman’s music in Main Vaapas Aaunga wins praise, revisit some of the legendary composer’s most iconic film soundtracks. From Roja and Bombay to Rockstar and Jodhaa Akbar, these albums continue to captivate listeners across generations.

articles.title: Sagar Parekh Calls Fans' Feedback 'Incredibly Special', Says 'It Fills Me With Gratitude'
articles.description: Sagar Parekh has worked in different shows over the years, including the hit Anupama.

articles.title: 'Maa Inti Bangaram' box office collection Day 2 [LIVE]: Samantha Ruth Prabhu starrer eyes Rs. 10 crore net on first Saturday
articles.description: Following a blockbuster theatrical launch, Samantha Ruth Prabhu’s action-packed family drama, 'Maa Inti Bangaram', is keeping the momentum alive on its second day. Spearheaded by a powerful performance from the leading lady, the B.V. Nandini Reddy directorial is proving its mettle at the ticket windows. Following a spectacular double-digit worldwide debut, early real-time indicators point toward strong evening and night show occupancies as the film marches into its critical first weekend.
